summary: Full backend + frontend testing of STEMScroll MVP. Backend pytest: 16/16 passed across cards, missions, user/onboarding, streak, XP, age-mode, saved-cards, view-tracking, and AI generate. Frontend: onboarding flow (4 steps), feed snap-scroll, top bar (logo/streak/age-mode picker), card content, mascot footer, tab navigation (Feed/Missions/Library/Explore/Me), mission detail, explore screen with topic input + 5 type chips + 8 subject tiles + Generate button — all render correctly on mobile viewport (390x844). User flow Splash→Onboarding→Feed→Tabs end-to-end works against the public preview URL.

minor.issue: Returns 46 cards, spec called for '50+'. Functional but below stated target. Consider adding 4 more curated cards to seed_cards.py.

ui_bugs.issue: Large top-of-card emoji renders inside an empty/dark circle in some cards (e.g. f16 'Black holes can sing'). Hero emoji icon not always visible inside the circle. Mascot footer renders fine.
ActivityIndicator 'Loading your STEM feed…' can persist briefly on first paint while user profile is fetched. Acceptable but could be smoother.

issues: Looks good — progress dots, mascot, ND toggle, primary Let's go button all properly sized for mobile.
Streak chip + age-mode toggle + logo all fit on 390px width. Good 44px touch targets.

react_native_issues.issue: expo.out.log shows: 'ExpoFontLoader.loadAsync rejected — Font file for ionicons is empty.' Icons still render (we see chevrons, sparkles, flame etc. in screenshots) so it appears to recover from cache, but a clean cold start may show fallback glyphs. Worth investigating root cause (corrupted ionicons font asset).

action_items: Optional: top up seed_cards.py from 46 → 50+ cards to match spec.
Investigate Expo font-loader warning for Ionicons (expo.out.log) — currently non-blocking but indicates a corrupt/empty bundled font asset.
Consider showing actual hero emoji inside the large circle on every card (some cards render an empty dark circle for the top emoji — check STEMCard hero emoji styling).
Cosmetic: 'Loading your STEM feed…' flash on first paint — consider deferring spinner until 200ms or splash hand-off.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: All endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id via projection.
server.py: _level_from_xp uses thresholds [0,50,150,400,1000,2500] → max level 6 — matches the 'Curious Atom → Universe' progression.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown') — works but Pydantic/FastAPI recommends lifespan handlers in 2026.
All interactive elements have testID — good coverage.
(tabs)/index.tsx FlatList recomputes cardHeight via Platform.OS conditional (88 iOS / 68 Android). On web preview this defaults to non-iOS branch which is fine.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all critical flows verified, 2 minor UI/runtime warnings)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed users via API during pytest runs. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL is https://quick-learn-stem.preview.emergentagent.com (same for FE and BE; BE under /api). Anonymous user_id auto-generated in localStorage — clear localStorage to force onboarding. Run backend tests: cd /app/backend && pytest tests/test_stemscroll_api.py -v. All endpoints return JSON with no '_id'. AI /cards/generate works with Claude key configured in backend/.env and gracefully falls back to a seed card on error. TestIDs of note: feed-container, feed-top-bar, streak-counter, age-mode-toggle, age-mode-picker, mode-option-{id}, save-heart-btn, card-quiz-option-{idx}, mission-{id}, mission-detail, library-screen, library-empty, explore-topic-input, generate-btn, type-chip-{t}, subject-{k}, profile-screen, toggle-nd, profile-mode-{id}, next-btn, finish-btn, onboarding-step-{0..3}, age-mode-{id}, topic-{k}, neurodiverse-toggle.
rca_of_issue: No bugs identified that block functionality. The only deviation from spec is seed-card count (46 vs '50+'); rest matches the feature list.
